consent.title: Research Participation Notice
consent.description:
This website is part of an MIT research study on how people solve complex problems. If you choose to continue, your gameplay interactions (including clicks and mouse movements) may be recorded and used for research purposes.

Participation is voluntary. You may stop at any time by leaving the site. Data are analyzed in de-identified form and will not be used to identify you.

By continuing, you indicate that you are age 18 or older and consent to participate.

If you have any concerns, you may contact the MIT IRB at couhes@mit.edu.
